text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon and I visit a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Bow twice, clap twice, bow once, complete... I
have completed my mission.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I reported that the number of instances I have
detected my health as poor has increased
recently.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to an online article I read, this is one
method of improving poor health.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But I feel no different... There seems to be an
error in the article's information.
Hey! Hold up, you two!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I recognize that voice as Inari's. Now halting
movement in response to "hold up."

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What have we got here? I came here to pray, but
I couldn't help but overhear you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You guys don't know the first thing about shrine worship! You need more style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You gotta put your heart and soul into ringing
that bell and clapping your hands, and then pray
right from your diaphragm!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You gotta show off the passion behind your wish
if you want the gods to think it's worth granting!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. It seems the information was indeed
mistaken.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Update of shrine visitation manual complete. I
will now pray with "style."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, we end up trying to worship at the shrine
again...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
First... Utilize heart and soul to ring the bell and
clap hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang, clang! Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I wish to purge my system of any faulty programs!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Stabilization of vital signs confirmed. The cleanup
was successful, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Woo! Now that was praying in style! The gods are gonna love that one.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: So this is the power of "style." How intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's a result of her stylish shrine worship
or not, Mihono Bourbon is back to full health!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang, clang! Craaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The bell has fallen down!

text_block_list.name: Shinto Priest
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! Are you girls hurt?! I've been thinking that
it was time to install a new bell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems our timing was bad, and now with the
bell broken, we're unable to complete our
worship. Left with no other options, we return to
the academy.
